headlines.description: — Jalen Johnson scored 22 points and had 13 rebounds, Nickeil Alexander-Walker scored 21 points, and the Atlanta Hawks beat Indiana 128-108 in NBA Cup group play on Friday night to keep the Pacers winless this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Johnson scores 22 as Hawks beat Pacers 128-108 to keep Indiana winless

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 32 points, Anfernee Simons added 19 and the Boston Celtics never trailed in a 109-108 win against the Philadelphia 76ers on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brown scores 32 points to lead Celtics past 76ers 109-108 for third straight win

headlines.description: — Jamison Battle scored 20 points, including a pair of 3-pointers that helped the Toronto Raptors pull away in the final two minutes of a 112-101 victory over the Cleveland Cavaliers in the NBA Cup opener for both teams Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jamison Battle scores 20 points and hits key pair of 3s as Raptors beat Cavs 112-101

events.name: New York Knicks at Chicago Bulls

headlines.description: — Josh Giddey scored a career-high 32 points with 10 rebounds and nine assists, Nikola Vucevic added 26 points, and the Chicago Bulls beat the New York Knicks 135-125 on Friday night to stay undefeated and get out to their best start in nearly three...
headlines.shortLinkText: Giddey, Vucevic lead Bulls past Knicks 135-125 and a 5-0 start, their best in 29 years.

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Memphis Grizzlies

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic had 44 points, 12 rebounds and six assists in his return after a three-game absence and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Memphis Grizzlies 117-112 on Friday night in the opening game of the NBA Cup for each team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Doncic returns after 3-game absence, scores 44 to lead Lakers past Grizzlies 117-112

headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 36 points and had nine assists to lead the Phoenix Suns to a 118-96 win over the Utah Jazz in NBA Cup group play on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Booker scores 36 as Suns beat Jazz 118-96

events.name: Denver Nuggets at Portland Trail Blazers

headlines.description: — Jerami Grant made a pair of free throws with 1.4 seconds left and the Portland Trail Blazers rallied for a 109-107 victory over the Denver Nuggets on Friday night in the NBA Cup opener for both teams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grant hits free throws with 1.4 seconds left and Blazers beat Nuggets 109-107

events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at LA Clippers

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard made a buzzer-beater and finished with 34 points to give the Los Angeles Clippers a 126-124 win over the New Orleans Pelicans on Friday night in the first game of the NBA Cup group stage for both teams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kawhi Leonard wins it at buzzer, Clippers hold off hot-shooting Pelicans 126-124
